response.justification: The candidate lacks direct experience with C++ or Rust in geospatial routing pipelines, and while they have GIS-related open-source work in DLang and Node.js, there is no evidence of low-latency routing tile generation, distributed systems for map data, or production navigation systems as required. Their stack is dominated by JavaScript/TypeScript and DLang, with minimal C++ exposure limited to academic/legacy projects over a decade ago.
strengths: Strong open-source GIS experience with GISCollective and geospatial data tools
Demonstrated ability to work across full stack and learn new technologies rapidly
Proven track record in building scalable data systems and developer tooling
concerns: No commercial C++ or Rust experience in routing, navigation, or geospatial pipelines
Lack of demonstrated expertise in distributed systems, fault tolerance, or real-time map updates
C++ exposure is outdated (2014) and not applied to modern routing data pipelines
